name: Twin Mountain Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add sugar, mixing well after each addition.
3. Stir in the salt and beaten egg.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients (flour and baking powder) with milk, ensuring a well combined batter.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased muffin pan.
6. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes at 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Turn off the oven when finished.
